reviews.comment:
Está piola, pero hasta la pindorcha siempre. La atención es buena y si te copas con unos mates y no tenes agua te venden adentro sin monedas, que ya no sé para existen con la inflamación cerca del sol.

(Translated by Google)
It's cool, but even the pindorcha always. The service is good, and if you want to have some mate and don't have water, they'll sell you inside without coins, which I don't know why they exist anymore with the inflammation near the sun.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaWYzSzJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención como en casi todos los ACA, Los baños estaban muy limpios y cuando pasamos no había mucha gente así que no hubo espera para cargar y comprar un café.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, as in almost all ACAs. The bathrooms were very clean and when we went there weren't many people so there was no wait to fill up and buy a coffee.

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy lindo, la atención y la amabilidad  de quienes trabajan en este lugar es de destacar, además de las condiciones excelentes de limpieza y con los detalles  como tener baño otra discapacitados que es genial que los tengan.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place. The attention and kindness of the staff are noteworthy, along with the excellent cleanliness and thoughtful touches like having a disabled-friendly bathroom, which is great to have.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbjlPQWVREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención y baños geniales pero pague 4600 para un te y 3 café con leche más una docena de medialunas demaciado caro

(Translated by Google)
The service and bathrooms were great, but I paid 4600 for a tea and 3 coffees with milk plus a dozen croissants – way too expensive
